hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "작업이 완료되었습니다." with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null || true

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then if [[ "$file" == */backend/* ]]; then cd /Users/jason/Documents/vscode/petlog/backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; elif [[ "$file" == */frontend/* ]]; then cd /Users/jason/Documents/vscode/petlog/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; fi; fi
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
